rewritten_requirements: The system shall not redefine States VerifyCard and OutOfService.
The system shall not redefine the VerifyTransaction to ReleaseCard Transition.
The system shall allow users to enter a desired amount in the State EnterAmount.
The system shall add two new Transitions, one into and one out of the new State EnterAmount.
The system shall redefine the State SelectedAmount to act as the source or target for a new Transition.
The system shall redefine the State VerifyTransaction to act as the source of a new Transition with EnterAmount as its target.
